executives.name: Jason Simpson
executives.background: Mr. Simpson has over 25 years of experience in the mining industry. Prior to joining Orla, he was Chief Operating Officer of Torex Gold Resources Inc. and has held senior roles at G Mining Services and Vale.

executives.name: Etienne Morin
executives.background: Mr. Morin has over 15 years of experience in mining finance and corporate development. He previously served as Director, Corporate Development at Goldcorp Inc.

executives.name: Andrew Cormier
executives.background: Mr. Cormier has over 30 years of experience in project development and operations. He was previously Vice President, Project Development at Torex Gold Resources Inc.

executives.name: Sylvain Gauthier
executives.background: Mr. Gauthier has over 25 years of experience in human resources and organizational development, primarily in the mining sector.

board_of_directors.name: Charles Jeannes
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Jeannes is a mining industry veteran, formerly the President and CEO of Goldcorp Inc. from 2008 to 2016.

board_of_directors.name: Jason Simpson
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Orla Mining Ltd.

board_of_directors.name: Elizabeth McGregor
board_of_directors.background: Ms. McGregor is a CPA with over 20 years of experience, formerly CFO of Tahoe Resources Inc.

board_of_directors.name: David Stephens
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Stephens is the VP of Corporate Development at Agnico Eagle Mines Limited.

board_of_directors.name: Tamara Brown
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Brown is a mining professional with over 25 years of experience in finance and business development.

board_of_directors.name: Ana Barbara Mungaray
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Mungaray is an economist with extensive experience in the Mexican public sector, including the Ministry of Economy.

board_of_directors.name: Scott Perry
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Perry was formerly the President and CEO of Centerra Gold Inc.

sources.source_description: Corporate Website - Management and Directors Page
